features.name: Peerless Skill
features.description: Starting 14th level, you can use your Bardic Inspiration die to modify a creature's check. When you expend a Bardic Inspiration die, you can call upon its power before the roll is made. The DM determines whether the roll succeeds or fails based on the outcome of the die roll.

features.name: Oath of the Ancients
features.description: At 1st level, you make a sacred vow to protect and preserve the world. Your oath grants you access to additional spells and a unique set of abilities.

features.name: When @action cast bard you can ll1ake Qne weapon attack as a bonus actiol1.
